name: modal
description: Animated dialog modal with backdrop, spring/timing enter/exit animations, optional close button, focus trap, and Android back button support.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Callback invoked when the modal is requested to close (overlay press, close button, or Android back)

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the modal dialog

props.name: visible
props.description: Controlled visibility; when omitted the modal manages its own state via the ref API

props.name: accessibilityLabel
props.description: Accessibility label for the modal container; defaults to 'Dialog'

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Maximum width constraint of the modal sheet

props.name: showCloseButton
props.description: Whether to render the close (×) button in the top-right corner

props.name: closeOnOverlayPress
props.description: Whether pressing the backdrop dismisses the modal

examples.label: Example 1
Example 2
Example 3
examples.code:
// Narrow modal with close button hidden (user must interact with content to dismiss)
<Modal visible={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} maxWidth="narrow" showCloseButton={false}>
  <PinEntry onSuccess={() => setOpen(false)} />
</Modal>
